name: full-project
description: Full MAS RTL project: SPEC → RTL → TB → SIM loop → DOC

tasks.detail: Output: module name, parameter list with defaults, port list (name/width/direction), clock/reset convention, functional description. Write to <module>_spec.md.
Use /gen-rtl <module_name>. Follow rtl_gen rules: nonblocking in always_ff, blocking in always_comb, all FF have reset, no latches. Output: <module>.sv. Gate: lint 0 errors.
Run lint on <module>.sv. Fix all errors before proceeding to TB. This is a hard gate — tb_gen cannot start until lint is clean.
Use /gen-tb <module_name>. Follow tb_gen rules. Output: tb_<module>.sv (top-level), tc_<module>.sv (test cases `included). Cover: reset, normal operation, edge cases, corner cases.
Run simulation. Fix bugs in DUT (rtl_gen context) or TB (tb_gen context) as needed. Loop until 0 errors, 0 warnings.
Use /gen-doc <module_name> to create skeleton. Fill in: functional description, timing diagram, design notes, simulation results. Output: <module>_spec.md (final).
